hyperedges.label: Finance Tool Family
hyperedges.rationale: All finance tools share category root via parent_dossier YAML field; root §§2,5,6 inherited

hyperedges.label: Text Tool Family
hyperedges.rationale: All text tools share category root via reuse_parent YAML field; root §§2,5,6 inherited

hyperedges.label: Time Tool Family
hyperedges.rationale: Both time tools share category root via reuse_parent; root mentions stunden-zu-minuten as third tool

hyperedges.label: Video Tool Family
hyperedges.rationale: Both video tools are in video category; webcam inherits root, video-hintergrund explicitly excludes root but remains in category

hyperedges.label: Length Converter Family
hyperedges.rationale: All three are length converters with shared competitor set; no explicit category root found in chunk

hyperedges.label: Privacy-First Cross-Cutting Differentiator
hyperedges.rationale: Privacy-First / DSGVO / client-only appears as explicit §9 differentiator in every dossier in this chunk

hyperedges.label: Temporal API ES2026 Adopters
hyperedges.rationale: Time category root and both time tools explicitly list Temporal API ES2026 as core tech

hyperedges.label: German Localization Differentiators
hyperedges.rationale: These tools have DE-specific features as differentiators: German Blindtext, DE reading speed 250wpm, DE Pfund disambiguation, DE locale formatting

hyperedges.label: WebGPU ML Pipeline Tools
hyperedges.rationale: video-hintergrund-entfernen §1 pipeline: WebCodecs → ONNX Runtime Web (WebGPU-EP) → BiRefNet_lite inference → OffscreenCanvas

links.source_location: Cross-Checks: Performance-Auditor weekly + Analytics CWV correlated
CEO aggregates critic verdicts in Critic-Aggregation step
Unterschied: Merged-Critic prüft Frontmatter syntaktisch, Content-Critic semantisch
Wert 1: Daten-Triangulation — trigger nur bei >=2 Metriken fail
Auto-Resolves gehen in Digest statt User-Eskalation
Supersedes note — Tier-FIFO replaced by SEO-order
Analysis shows 8 enum extensions needed for speed/data/pressure/energy/power/fuel/angle/torque
800-tool cluster analysis shows only 36% buildable without enum extension
Design system — AAA contrast mandated across all tools
Persoenlichkeitstest is the flagship tool of the 79-tool psychology catalog
17 screening rounds culminating in kittokit as final choice
Architecture section establishes pattern for first converter
Component map dispatches based on tool-config tool type from three-source arch
Single registry design decision §1 — cleaner than two parallel registries
WebGPU detection needed because BiRefNet uses WebGPU + WASM fallback
Locked design decisions §3 — transparency is headline use-case
list.ts is foundation; category fallback extends it
Design decision — localized slugs matches the list.ts approach
process-webp.ts pure function using browser Canvas API
Category taxonomy is prerequisite for fallback logic
Architecture section — ffmpeg.wasm rejected due to COOP/COEP headers that break AdSense
Architecture — Mediabunny chosen for COOP/COEP-free AdSense compatibility
§4 — BiRefNet chosen after RVM GPL-3.0 KO
imgly KO forces alternative model selection
BRIA NC KO narrows options to MIT-licensed models
MatAnyone2 NC KO further narrows to permissive MIT
Final recommendation maps to sprache-verbessern tool
atten_lim_db differentiates from Adobe Podcast V2 robotic voice issue
EU AI Act section — filter vs. generative distinction matters legally
WAVE 2 — PDF-Suite: Konkurrenten upload, we don't
WAVE 1 enabled by finance enum unlock
WAVE 1 enabled by finance enum unlock
WAVE 3 enabled by construction enum unlock
Framework section — IPIP Public Domain chosen for commercial use
Input formats — HEIC/HEIF needed for iOS users
A. Baseline-Features — AV1+Alpha not browser-native, VP9 ok Chrome/FF
Re-Evaluation trigger D — Labeling requirements concrete 08/2026
Resolution section — 4K passthrough respects source quality
Locked design decisions §6 — mobile-first for image tools
ML loading — singleton cache avoids repeated 110 MB download
notes — ML pipeline references design spec §9
frontmatter — toolId, language, metaDescription, tagline, category all present
M4 — resolved #11 NBSP in brutto-netto; also covers stundenlohn NBSP gap

interactive type added to componentByType, routableTypes, render block

AF-1 — identical meta-comment pattern as rabatt-rechner KON-90
C-1 BLOCKER — same em-target issue confirmed by content-critic

hyperedges.rationale: All text tools share category root via reuse_parent YAML field; root §§2,5,6 inherited

hyperedges.rationale: Both time tools share category root via reuse_parent; root mentions stunden-zu-minuten as third tool

hyperedges.rationale: Both video tools are in video category; webcam inherits root, video-hintergrund explicitly excludes root but remains in category

hyperedges.label: Length Converter Family
hyperedges.rationale: All three are length converters with shared competitor set; no explicit category root found in chunk

hyperedges.label: Privacy-First Cross-Cutting Differentiator

hyperedges.label: German Localization Differentiators
